Container.Name: mxlrcgo-svc
Container.Overview: Fetch synced lyrics from Musixmatch and save them as .lrc files for music libraries.
Container.Description: mxlrcgo-svc fetches synced lyrics from the Musixmatch API, writes .lrc files, and can run as a small HTTP service for Lidarr webhook-driven lyric fetching.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Stores configuration and the SQLite database.

Config.Name: Music Library
Config.Description: Path to your music library. Maps to /music inside the container.

Config.Name: Musixmatch Token
Config.Description: Musixmatch API token used to fetch lyrics.

Config.Name: Webhook API Key
Config.Description: API key accepted by webhook endpoints. Generate one with mxlrcgo-svc keys create --scope webhook.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Default 99 maps to nobody on Unraid.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions. Default 100 maps to users on Unraid.

Config.Name: Server Address
Config.Description: HTTP listen address inside the container.

Config.Name: Output Directory
Config.Description: Default directory for generated lyric files from webhook jobs.

Config.Name: API Cooldown
Config.Description: Cooldown between Musixmatch API requests in seconds.
